name: polymath-connector-gcp
description: GCP connector: cli-only wrapper around `gcloud` for resource inspection — describe, IAM policy + testIamPermissions, recent audit logs, cost ping.

gcpProject.title: GCP project ID
gcpProject.description: Default project ID (not project number). Resource queries scope to this project unless an absolute path overrides.

gcpRegion.title: Default GCP region
gcpRegion.description: Default region for regional resources (e.g. us-central1, europe-west1).
